self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def 'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def       use_w4a16_mxfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n rN/2, r(N/2+1), .. r(N-1)]\n    to\n    [r0, rN/2, r1, rN/2+1, ..., r(N/2-1), r(N-1)]\n    \"\"\"\n    M = x.shape[0]\n    assert M % 2 == 0, f\"x.shape[0] must be even, not {M}\"\n\n    row_indices = row_indices is an array of size M telling us from which old_row\n    # the new_row should be taken.\n    row_indices = torch.empty(M, dtype=torch.long)\n\n    for old_row in range(M):\n        block_idx = old_row // shuffle_block_size\n        row_in_block = old_row % shuffle_block_size\n        mapped_row_in_block = row_map[row_in_block]\n\n        new_row = block_idx * shuffle_block_size + mapped_row_in_block\n\n        row_indices[new_row] = old_row\n\n    return row_indices\n\n\ndef shuffle_matrix_a(input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n                     epilogue_tile_m: int) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    PyTorch equivalent of trtllm-gen `shuffleMatrixA`\n    \"\"\"\n    row_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(input_tensor,\n                                                   epilogue_tile_m)\n\n    return torch.ops.trtllm.shuffle_matrix(input_tensor,\n                                           row_indices.to(input_tensor.device))\n\n\ndef get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(\n        input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n        epilogue_tile_m: int,\n        num_elts_per_sf: int = 16) -> torch.Tensor:\n\n    assert input_tensor.dtype == float4_sf_dtype\n    assert num_elts_per_sf == 16 or num_elts_per_sf == 32\n\n    assert input_tensor.dim(\n    ) == 2, f\"input_tensor should be a 2D tensor, not {input_tensor.dim()}\"\n\n    # M, K from the input\n    M, K = input_tensor.shape\n    assert M % 128 == 0\n    assert K % 4 == 0\n\n    row_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(input_tensor,\n                                                   epilogue_tile_m)\n\n    return row_indices\n\n\ndef shuffle_matrix_sf_a(\n    input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n    epilogue_tile_m: int,\n    num_elts_per_sf: int = 16,\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Cuda implementation of trtllm-gen `shuffleMatrixSfA` but with a caveat.\n    `shuffleMatrixSfA` expects the input to be in 128x4 layout and then\n    apply the same shuffling in `shuffleMatrixA` and writes out in 128x4\n    layout.\n    This function expects the input to be in linear layout. It's done this\n    way because the scaling factors in the NVFP4 checkpoints are quantized\n    and are in linear layout.\n    This function doesn't add padding.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    row_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(input_tensor,\n                                                      epilogue_tile_m)\n\n    w_shuffled = torch.ops.trtllm.shuffle_matrix(\n        input_tensor, row_indices.to(input_tensor.device))\n\n    # 128x4\n    return torch.ops.trtllm.block_scale_interleave(w_shuffled)\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":26,"oldLines":6,"newStart":26,"newLines":7,"lines":[" class FP4GemmType(IntEnum):","     W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4 = 0","     W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = 1","+    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = 2"," "," "," def get_fp4_shape(input_shape, sf_vec_size, is_swizzled_layout=True):"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n}\n\n// mat1: [B, M, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2 or [B, M, K], FLOAT8_E4M3FN\n// mat2: [B, N, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2\n// out: [B, M, N], fp16/bf16/fp32\n// mat1Scale: ceil(M / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// mat2Scale: ceil(N / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// globalScale: [1], 1 / (((448 * 6) / mat1.abs().max()) * ((448 * 6) / mat2.abs().max()))\n// B = 1 for GEMM op as a special case\n// Only W4A4_NVFP4 and W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 are currently supported\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm_impl(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype, bool to_userbuffers = false,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* maybe_config = nullptr)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, torch::kFloat8_e4m3fn);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    int mat2_k_scale = fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 ? 2 : 1;\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat1Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat2Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(globalScale, at::ScalarType::Float);\n\n    int64_t m, n, k, b;\n    if (mat1.dim() == 2)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 2, \"mat2 must be a matrix\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[1] == mat2.sizes()[1] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[0];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[0];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[1] * 2;\n        b = 1;\n    }\n    else if (mat1.dim() == 3)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 3, \"mat2 must be a batch of matrices\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[0] == mat2.sizes()[0], \"mat1 and mat2 must have the same batch size (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \")\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[2] == mat2.sizes()[2] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[2], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[2], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[1];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[1];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[2] * 2;\n        b = mat1.sizes()[0];\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"mat1 must be a matrix or a batch of matrices\");\n    }\n\n    auto config = maybe_config ? *maybe_config : getDefaultGemmConfig(m, n, k, fp4GemmType);\n\n    constexpr int alignment = 32;\n    TORCH_CHECK(k % alignment == 0, \"Expected k to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat1 shape: (\",\n        mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \"), k: \", k, \".\");\n    TORCH_CHECK(n % alignment == 0, \"Expected n to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat2 shape: (\",\n        mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \").\");\n\n    if (!out_dtype)\n    {\n        out_dtype = torch::kHalf;\n    }\n    TORCH_CHECK(out_dtype == torch::kFloat || out_dtype == torch::kHalf || out_dtype == torch::kBFloat16,\n        \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32. It defaults to fp16.\");\n\n    std::vector<int64_t> out_shape = mat1.dim() == 2 ? std::vector<int64_t>{m, n} : std::vector<int64_t>{b, m, n};\n    at::Tensor out;\n    if (to_userbuffers)\n    {\n        out = torch_ext::create_userbuffers_tensor(out_shape, out_dtype.value()).first;\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        out = at::detail::empty_cuda(out_shape, out_dtype.value(), mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n    }\n    switch (out_dtype.value())\n    {\n    case at::ScalarType::Half:\n        runGemm<half>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::BFloat16:\n        runGemm<__nv_bfloat16>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::Float:\n        runGemm<float>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    default: C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n    }\n    return out;\n}\n\n} // namespace\n\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype)\n{\n    // The functional version of this op does not do any profiling; use the profiler class below instead for\n    // better performance.\n    // Note that we can still add a heuristic here.\n    return fp4_bmm_impl(\n        mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType), out_dtype);\n}\n\nclass FP4GemmRunner : public torch::CustomClassHolder\n{\npublic:\n    explicit FP4GemmRunner(at::ScalarType outputDtype, int64_t fp4GemmType)\n        : mOutputDtype(outputDtype)\n        , mfp4GemmType(static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType))\n    {\n        if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Half)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Float)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#ifdef ENABLE_BF16\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::BFloat16)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#endif\n        else\n        {\n            C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n        }\n        mConfigs = mGemmRunner->getConfigs();\n    }\n\n    at::Tensor runGemm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n        at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, bool to_userbuffers, int64_t configIdx) const\n    {\n        tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* config = nullptr;\n        if (configIdx != -1)\n        {\n            TORCH_CHECK(configIdx >= 0 && configIdx < getNumConfigs());\n            config = &mConfigs.at(configIdx);\n        }\n        return fp4_bmm_impl(\n            mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, mfp4GemmType, mOutputDtype, to_userbuffers, config);\n    }\n\n    at::ScalarType getOutputDtype() const\n    {\n        return mOutputDtype;\n    }\n\n    int64_t getNumConfigs() const\n    {\n        return static_cast<int64_t>(mConfigs.size());\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    std::shared_ptr<CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface> mGemmRunner{nullptr};\n    std::vector<tkc::CutlassGemmConfig> mConfigs;\n    at::ScalarType mOutputDtype;\n    FP4GemmType mfp4GemmType;\n};\n} // namespace torch_ext\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_FRAGMENT(trtllm, m)\n{\n    m.class_<tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner>(\"FP4GemmRunner\")\n        .def(torch::init<at::ScalarType, int64_t>())\n        .def(\"run_gemm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::runGemm)\n        .def(\"get_num_configs\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::getNumConfigs);\n\n    m.def(\n        \"fp4_bmm(Tensor mat1, Tensor mat2, Tensor mat1Scale, Tensor mat2Scale, Tensor globalScale, int fp4GemmType, \"\n        \"ScalarType? out_dtype=None) -> Tensor\");\n    m.def(\n        \"fp4_gemm(Tensor mat1, Tensor mat2, Tensor mat1Scale, Tensor mat2Scale, Tensor globalScale, int fp4GemmType, \"\n        \"ScalarType? out_dtype=None) -> Tensor\");\n}\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_IMPL(trtllm, CUDA, m)\n{\n    m.impl(\"fp4_bmm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::fp4_bmm);\n    m.impl(\"fp4_gemm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::fp4_bmm);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":84,"oldLines":6,"newStart":84,"newLines":11,"lines":["         return getDefaultGemmConfig(int64_t m, int64_t n, int64_t k, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType)\n{\n    auto const sm = tensorrt_llm::common::getSMVersion();\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        if (sm >= 120)\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM120::CtaShape128x128x256B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n        else if (sm == 103)\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x256B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x256B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_4x4x1);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n    }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nvoid runGemm(at::Tensor& out, at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t m, int64_t n, int64_t k, int64_t batch_count,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const& gemmConfig, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n}\n\n// mat1: [B, M, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2 or [B, M, K], FLOAT8_E4M3FN\n// mat2: [B, N, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2\n// out: [B, M, N], fp16/bf16/fp32\n// mat1Scale: ceil(M / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// mat2Scale: ceil(N / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// globalScale: [1], 1 / (((448 * 6) / mat1.abs().max()) * ((448 * 6) / mat2.abs().max()))\n// B = 1 for GEMM op as a special case\n// Only W4A4_NVFP4 and W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 are currently supported\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm_impl(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype, bool to_userbuffers = false,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* maybe_config = nullptr)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, torch::kFloat8_e4m3fn);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    int mat2_k_scale = fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 ? 2 : 1;\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat1Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat2Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(globalScale, at::ScalarType::Float);\n\n    int64_t m, n, k, b;\n    if (mat1.dim() == 2)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 2, \"mat2 must be a matrix\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[1] == mat2.sizes()[1] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[0];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[0];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[1] * 2;\n        b = 1;\n    }\n    else if (mat1.dim() == 3)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 3, \"mat2 must be a batch of matrices\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[0] == mat2.sizes()[0], \"mat1 and mat2 must have the same batch size (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \")\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[2] == mat2.sizes()[2] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[2], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[2], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[1];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[1];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[2] * 2;\n        b = mat1.sizes()[0];\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"mat1 must be a matrix or a batch of matrices\");\n    }\n\n    auto config = maybe_config ? *maybe_config : getDefaultGemmConfig(m, n, k, fp4GemmType);\n\n    constexpr int alignment = 32;\n    TORCH_CHECK(k % alignment == 0, \"Expected k to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat1 shape: (\",\n        mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \"), k: \", k, \".\");\n    TORCH_CHECK(n % alignment == 0, \"Expected n to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat2 shape: (\",\n        mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \").\");\n\n    if (!out_dtype)\n    {\n        out_dtype = torch::kHalf;\n    }\n    TORCH_CHECK(out_dtype == torch::kFloat || out_dtype == torch::kHalf || out_dtype == torch::kBFloat16,\n        \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32. It defaults to fp16.\");\n\n    std::vector<int64_t> out_shape = mat1.dim() == 2 ? std::vector<int64_t>{m, n} : std::vector<int64_t>{b, m, n};\n    at::Tensor out;\n    if (to_userbuffers)\n    {\n        out = torch_ext::create_userbuffers_tensor(out_shape, out_dtype.value()).first;\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        out = at::detail::empty_cuda(out_shape, out_dtype.value(), mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n    }\n    switch (out_dtype.value())\n    {\n    case at::ScalarType::Half:\n        runGemm<half>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::BFloat16:\n        runGemm<__nv_bfloat16>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::Float:\n        runGemm<float>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    default: C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n    }\n    return out;\n}\n\n} // namespace\n\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype)\n{\n    // The functional version of this op does not do any profiling; use the profiler class below instead for\n    // better performance.\n    // Note that we can still add a heuristic here.\n    return fp4_bmm_impl(\n        mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType), out_dtype);\n}\n\nclass FP4GemmRunner : public torch::CustomClassHolder\n{\npublic:\n    explicit FP4GemmRunner(at::ScalarType outputDtype, int64_t fp4GemmType)\n        : mOutputDtype(outputDtype)\n        , mfp4GemmType(static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType))\n    {\n        if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Half)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Float)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#ifdef ENABLE_BF16\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::BFloat16)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#endif\n        else\n        {\n            C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n        }\n        mConfigs = mGemmRunner->getConfigs();\n    }\n\n    at::Tensor runGemm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n        at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, bool to_userbuffers, int64_t configIdx) const\n    {\n        tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* config = nullptr;\n        if (configIdx != -1)\n        {\n            TORCH_CHECK(configIdx >= 0 && configIdx < getNumConfigs());\n            config = &mConfigs.at(configIdx);\n        }\n        return fp4_bmm_impl(\n            mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, mfp4GemmType, mOutputDtype, to_userbuffers, config);\n    }\n\n    at::ScalarType getOutputDtype() const\n    {\n        return mOutputDtype;\n    }\n\n    int64_t getNumConfigs() const\n    {\n        return static_cast<int64_t>(mConfigs.size());\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    std::shared_ptr<CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface> mGemmRunner{nullptr};\n    std::vector<tkc::CutlassGemmConfig> mConfigs;\n    at::ScalarType mOutputDtype;\n    FP4GemmType mfp4GemmType;\n};\n} // namespace torch_ext\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_FRAGMENT(trtllm, m)\n{\n    m.class_<tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner>(\"FP4GemmRunner\")\n tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x256B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x256B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_4x4x1);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n    }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nvoid runGemm(at::Tensor& out, at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t m, int64_t n, int64_t k, int64_t batch_count,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const& gemmConfig, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n}\n\n// mat1: [B, M, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2 or [B, M, K], FLOAT8_E4M3FN\n// mat2: [B, N, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2\n// out: [B, M, N], fp16/bf16/fp32\n// mat1Scale: ceil(M / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// mat2Scale: ceil(N / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// globalScale: [1], 1 / (((448 * 6) / mat1.abs().max()) * ((448 * 6) / mat2.abs().max()))\n// B = 1 for GEMM op as a special case\n// Only W4A4_NVFP4 and W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 are currently supported\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm_impl(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype, bool to_userbuffers = false,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* maybe_config = nullptr)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, torch::kFloat8_e4m3fn);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    int mat2_k_scale = fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 ? 2 : 1;\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat1Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat2Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(globalScale, at::ScalarType::Float);\n\n    int64_t m, n, k, b;\n    if (mat1.dim() == 2)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 2, \"mat2 must be a matrix\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[1] == mat2.sizes()[1] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[0];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[0];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[1] * 2;\n        b = 1;\n    }\n    else if (mat1.dim() == 3)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 3, \"mat2 must be a batch of matrices\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[0] == mat2.sizes()[0], \"mat1 and mat2 must have the same batch size (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \")\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[2] == mat2.sizes()[2] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[2], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[2], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[1];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[1];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[2] * 2;\n        b = mat1.sizes()[0];\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"mat1 must be a matrix or a batch of matrices\");\n    }\n\n    auto config = maybe_config ? *maybe_config : getDefaultGemmConfig(m, n, k, fp4GemmType);\n\n    constexpr int alignment = 32;\n    TORCH_CHECK(k % alignment == 0, \"Expected k to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat1 shape: (\",\n        mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \"), k: \", k, \".\");\n    TORCH_CHECK(n % alignment == 0, \"Expected n to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat2 shape: (\",\n        mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \").\");\n\n    if (!out_dtype)\n    {\n        out_dtype = torch::kHalf;\n    }\n    TORCH_CHECK(out_dtype == torch::kFloat || out_dtype == torch::kHalf || out_dtype == torch::kBFloat16,\n        \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32. It defaults to fp16.\");\n\n    std::vector<int64_t> out_shape = mat1.dim() == 2 ? std::vector<int64_t>{m, n} : std::vector<int64_t>{b, m, n};\n    at::Tensor out;\n    if (to_userbuffers)\n    {\n        out = torch_ext::create_userbuffers_tensor(out_shape, out_dtype.value()).first;\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        out = at::detail::empty_cuda(out_shape, out_dtype.value(), mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n    }\n    switch (out_dtype.value())\n    {\n    case at::ScalarType::Half:\n        runGemm<half>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::BFloat16:\n        runGemm<__nv_bfloat16>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::Float:\n        runGemm<float>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    default: C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n    }\n    return out;\n}\n\n} // namespace\n\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype)\n{\n    // The functional version of this op does not do any profiling; use the profiler class below instead for\n    // better performance.\n    // Note that we can still add a heuristic here.\n    return fp4_bmm_impl(\n        mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType), out_dtype);\n}\n\nclass FP4GemmRunner : public torch::CustomClassHolder\n{\npublic:\n    explicit FP4GemmRunner(at::ScalarType outputDtype, int64_t fp4GemmType)\n        : mOutputDtype(outputDtype)\n        , mfp4GemmType(static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType))\n    {\n        if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Half)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Float)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#ifdef ENABLE_BF16\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::BFloat16)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#endif\n        else\n        {\n            C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n        }\n        mConfigs = mGemmRunner->getConfigs();\n    }\n\n    at::Tensor runGemm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n        at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, bool to_userbuffers, int64_t configIdx) const\n    {\n        tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* config = nullptr;\n        if (configIdx != -1)\n        {\n            TORCH_CHECK(configIdx >= 0 && configIdx < getNumConfigs());\n            config = &mConfigs.at(configIdx);\n        }\n        return fp4_bmm_impl(\n            mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, mfp4GemmType, mOutputDtype, to_userbuffers, config);\n    }\n\n    at::ScalarType getOutputDtype() const\n    {\n        return mOutputDtype;\n    }\n\n    int64_t getNumConfigs() const\n    {\n        return static_cast<int64_t>(mConfigs.size());\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    std::shared_ptr<CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface> mGemmRunner{nullptr};\n    std::vector<tkc::CutlassGemmConfig> mConfigs;\n    at::ScalarType mOutputDtype;\n    FP4GemmType mfp4GemmType;\n};\n} // namespace torch_ext\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_FRAGMENT(trtllm, m)\n{\n    m.class_<tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner>(\"FP4GemmRunner\")\n        .def(torch::init<at::ScalarType, int64_t>())\n        .def(\"run_gemm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::runGemm)\n        .def(\"get_num_configs\", <cstddef>\n#include <cuda_fp16.h>\n\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <functional>\n#include <type_traits>\n#include <vector>\n\nnamespace tkc = tensorrt_llm::cutlass_extensions;\n#if defined(USING_OSS_CUTLASS_FP4_GEMM)\nusing tensorrt_llm::kernels::cutlass_kernels::FP4GemmType;\nusing tensorrt_llm::kernels::cutlass_kernels::CutlassFp4GemmRunner;\nusing tensorrt_llm::kernels::cutlass_kernels::CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface;\n#else\nusing tensorrt_llm::kernels::internal_cutlass_kernels::FP4GemmType;\nusing tensorrt_llm::kernels::internal_cutlass_kernels::CutlassFp4GemmRunner;\nusing tensorrt_llm::kernels::internal_cutlass_kernels::CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface;\n#endif\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_BEGIN\n\nnamespace torch_ext\n{\n\nnamespace\n{\n\ntkc::CutlassGemmConfig getDefaultGemmConfig(int64_t m, int64_t n, int64_t k, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType)\n{\n    auto const sm = tensorrt_llm::common::getSMVersion();\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        if (sm >= 120)\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM120::CtaShape128x128x256B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n        else if (sm == 103)\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x256B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n                tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO,\n                tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n        }\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x256B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_4x4x1);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        return tkc::CutlassGemmConfig(tkc::CutlassTileConfigSM100::CtaShape128x256x128B,\n            tkc::MainloopScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::EpilogueScheduleType::AUTO, tkc::ClusterShape::ClusterShape_1x1x1);\n    }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nvoid runGemm(at::Tensor& out, at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t m, int64_t n, int64_t k, int64_t batch_count,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const& gemmConfig, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    {\n        CutlassFp4GemmRunner<T, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8> gemmRunner;\n        int64_t const wsBytes = gemmRunner.getWorkspaceSize(m, n, k, batch_count);\n\n        at::Tensor workspace = at::detail::empty_cuda({wsBytes}, at::ScalarType::Char, mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n\n        gemmRunner.gemm(out.data_ptr(), mat1.const_data_ptr(), mat2.const_data_ptr(), mat1Scale.const_data_ptr(),\n            mat2Scale.const_data_ptr(), globalScale.data_ptr<float>(), m, n, k, batch_count, gemmConfig,\n            reinterpret_cast<char*>(workspace.data_ptr()), wsBytes, at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream(mat1.get_device()));\n    }\n}\n\n// mat1: [B, M, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2 or [B, M, K], FLOAT8_E4M3FN\n// mat2: [B, N, K / 2], FLOAT4_E2M1X2\n// out: [B, M, N], fp16/bf16/fp32\n// mat1Scale: ceil(M / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// mat2Scale: ceil(N / 128) * 128 * ceil(K / sfVecSize / 4) * 4, SF_DTYPE (UE4M3 or UE8M0)\n// globalScale: [1], 1 / (((448 * 6) / mat1.abs().max()) * ((448 * 6) / mat2.abs().max()))\n// B = 1 for GEMM op as a special case\n// Only W4A4_NVFP4 and W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 are currently supported\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm_impl(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, FP4GemmType fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype, bool to_userbuffers = false,\n    tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* maybe_config = nullptr)\n{\n    if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, torch::kFloat8_e4m3fn);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    else if (fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    {\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat1, torch::kChar);\n        CHECK_INPUT(mat2, FLOAT4_E2M1X2);\n    }\n    int mat2_k_scale = fp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 ? 2 : 1;\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat1Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n    CHECK_INPUT(mat2Scale, SF_DTYPE);\n\n    CHECK_INPUT(globalScale, at::ScalarType::Float);\n\n    int64_t m, n, k, b;\n    if (mat1.dim() == 2)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 2, \"mat2 must be a matrix\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[1] == mat2.sizes()[1] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[0];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[0];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[1] * 2;\n        b = 1;\n    }\n    else if (mat1.dim() == 3)\n    {\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat2.dim() == 3, \"mat2 must be a batch of matrices\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[0] == mat2.sizes()[0], \"mat1 and mat2 must have the same batch size (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[0], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[0], \")\");\n        TORCH_CHECK(mat1.sizes()[2] == mat2.sizes()[2] * mat2_k_scale, \"mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (\",\n            mat1.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[2], \" and \", mat2.sizes()[1], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[2], \")\");\n        m = mat1.sizes()[1];\n        n = mat2.sizes()[1];\n        k = mat2.sizes()[2] * 2;\n        b = mat1.sizes()[0];\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"mat1 must be a matrix or a batch of matrices\");\n    }\n\n    auto config = maybe_config ? *maybe_config : getDefaultGemmConfig(m, n, k, fp4GemmType);\n\n    constexpr int alignment = 32;\n    TORCH_CHECK(k % alignment == 0, \"Expected k to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat1 shape: (\",\n        mat1.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat1.sizes()[1], \"), k: \", k, \".\");\n    TORCH_CHECK(n % alignment == 0, \"Expected n to be divisible by \", alignment, \", but got mat2 shape: (\",\n        mat2.sizes()[0], \"x\", mat2.sizes()[1], \").\");\n\n    if (!out_dtype)\n    {\n        out_dtype = torch::kHalf;\n    }\n    TORCH_CHECK(out_dtype == torch::kFloat || out_dtype == torch::kHalf || out_dtype == torch::kBFloat16,\n        \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32. It defaults to fp16.\");\n\n    std::vector<int64_t> out_shape = mat1.dim() == 2 ? std::vector<int64_t>{m, n} : std::vector<int64_t>{b, m, n};\n    at::Tensor out;\n    if (to_userbuffers)\n    {\n        out = torch_ext::create_userbuffers_tensor(out_shape, out_dtype.value()).first;\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        out = at::detail::empty_cuda(out_shape, out_dtype.value(), mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n    }\n    switch (out_dtype.value())\n    {\n    case at::ScalarType::Half:\n        runGemm<half>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::BFloat16:\n        runGemm<__nv_bfloat16>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::Float:\n        runGemm<float>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    default: C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n    }\n    return out;\n}\n\n} // namespace\n\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype)\n{\n    // The functional version of this op does not do any profiling; use the profiler class below instead for\n    // better performance.\n    // Note that we can still add a heuristic here.\n    return fp4_bmm_impl(\n        mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType), out_dtype);\n}\n\nclass FP4GemmRunner : public torch::CustomClassHolder\n{\npublic:\n    explicit FP4GemmRunner(at::ScalarType outputDtype, int64_t fp4GemmType)\n        : mOutputDtype(outputDtype)\n        , mfp4GemmType(static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType))\n    {\n        if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Half)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Float)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#ifdef ENABLE_BF16\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::BFloat16)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#endif\n        else\n        {\n            C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n        }\n        mConfigs = mGemmRunner->getConfigs();\n    }\n\n    at::Tensor runGemm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n        at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, bool to_userbuffers, int64_t configIdx) const\n    {\n        tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* config = nullptr;\n        if (configIdx != -1)\n        {\n            TORCH_CHECK(configIdx >= 0 && configIdx < getNumConfigs());\n            config = &mConfigs.at(configIdx);\n        }\n        return fp4_bmm_impl(\n            mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, mfp4GemmType, mOutputDtype, to_userbuffers, config);\n    }\n\n    at::ScalarType getOutputDtype() const\n    {\n        return mOutputDtype;\n    }\n\n    int64_t getNumConfigs() const\n    {\n        return static_cast<int64_t>(mConfigs.size());\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    std::shared_ptr<CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface> mGemmRunner{nullptr};\n    std::vector<tkc::CutlassGemmConfig> mConfigs;\n    at::ScalarType mOutputDtype;\n    FP4GemmType mfp4GemmType;\n};\n} // namespace torch_ext\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_FRAGMENT(trtllm, m)\n{\n    m.class_<tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner>(\"FP4GemmRunner\")\n        .def(torch::init<at::ScalarType, int64_t>())\n        .def(\"run_gemm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::runGemm)\n        .def(\"get_num_configs\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::getNumConfigs);\n\n    m.def(\n        \"fp4_bmm(Tensor mat1, Tensor mat2, Tensor mat1Scale, Tensor mat2Scale, Tensor globalScale, int fp4GemmType, \"\n gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        CutlassFusedMoE supports:\n        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80\n        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89\n        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only\n        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only\n        - W8A16: SM >= 80\n        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}\n\n        Args:\n
